notes: v359 — THE SIGNAL REPORT CARD NOW RATES OUT OF 10 (plain English). The ladder used to speak in 'edge %' and t-stats, which is confusing for most people. Every combo and single now leads with a simple STRENGTH score out of 10 — green ≥7 = strong, gold 4–7 = promising, red under 4 = weak or unproven. It stays honest: the score is capped by how PROVEN a signal is, so a big % that's still 'too early' scores low, while a smaller edge you can actually trust scores higher (e.g. a proven +1.0% now rates ~5/10 and outranks an unproven +2.1% at ~2.9/10). The ladder is ranked by the /10. Nothing's hidden — the exact maths (the market-beating edge %, the SOLID/PROMISING/TOO EARLY badge, and the number of times it has fired) still sits right beside each row, and the '📖 How to read this card' guide now explains the score in plain English. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v359. ALSO RECENT — v358 signal flags added to the 📡 Market Radar as tap-to-filter tiles; v357 fixed 'not loading all data' (run Download all once after updating). (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
